The '''''Ahazi''''' was a [[Hajen-class fleet tender|''Hajen''-class fleet tender]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]].

==History==
During [[Operation Hammerblow]], the ''Ahazi'' exited [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] in the planet's atmosphere, disintegrating the ship and its crew instantly. The ship's destruction marked the fleet's first loss.

==Behind the scenes==
''Ahazi'' was also the name of a server—or "Galaxy"—in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Before the Storm (abridged audiobook)|''Before the Storm'' abridged audiobook]]
